displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Old Republic Vol. 5 [AKA Knight Errant]
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Knight Errant #1-5, Star Wars: Knight Errant – Deluge #1-5, Star Wars: Knight Errant – Escape #1-5, Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith #1-6 and material from Star Wars Tales #16.
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Old Republic Vol. 5 [AKA Knight Errant]
